prompt: A highly detailed realistic character design sheet for "WREN" — the last known cartographer in a world where all digital maps were destroyed. Front, side, back view. Age 26, slight build but enduring, paint and ink permanently stained fingers.
promptEn: A highly detailed realistic character design sheet for "WREN" — the last known cartographer in a world where all digital maps were destroyed. Front, side, back view. Age 26, slight build but enduring, paint and ink permanently stained fingers.
promptZh: 一份高度详细的写实风格角色设计图，主角是“WREN”——在这个所有数字地图都被摧毁的世界里，她是最后一位已知的制图师。包含正面、侧面和背面视图。年龄 26，身材略显单薄但坚韧，手指上永久留有颜料和墨水的痕迹。
